summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MediTrack medication tracking app - both backend APIs and frontend UI functionality verified successfully

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay can block interactions if not properly closed

passed_tests: Backend API health check and root endpoint (2/2)
User authentication flow - registration, login, profile, PIN reset (5/5)
Medicine management - CRUD operations with status calculation (4/4)
Time slots - default slots creation and retrieval (1/1)
Frontend user registration with PIN validation
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Medicines, Schedule, Settings)
Medicine management UI - add medicine form
Schedule page and time slots display
Language switching between Danish and English
Week navigation and day selection on dashboard

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (Core functionality working, minor modal interaction issue)
